mnemonics.title: DNN Layers
mnemonics.content: DEEP: Data → Extract features → Enhance patterns → Predict

mnemonics.title: ReLU
mnemonics.content: Rectified Linear Unit: Remember 'Reset' for zeroing negatives

mnemonics.title: Backprop Steps
mnemonics.content: FACE: Forward pass → Assess loss → Calculate gradients → Update weights

mnemonics.title: Overfitting Prevention
mnemonics.content: DROP: Dropout, Regularization, Early stopping, Data augmentation

visualTips.visualization: Imagine gradients flowing backward through computational graph arrows
Visualize filter sliding over image like flashlight beam
Picture hourglass shape with bottleneck in middle

analogies.analogy: Like factory assembly line: raw materials → components → final product
Like randomly removing workers to force team adaptability
Similar to quality control checks between production stages
